title: Forever A Child
description: Allows you to prevent ageable mobs from reaching adulthood
body:
This mods give you the ability to prevent any ageable mobs in the game from reaching adulthood (ex. baby cows will stay babies forever).

Preventing a mob from ageing can be done by right clicking it with a Poisonous Potato. To make it continue ageing you can right click the mob with a milk bucket.

(The locking and unlocking item can be changed using datapacks as they're done through tags)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"
